questions.scenario: The same image works in staging but production checkout writes receipts to the wrong storage account. Which layer is most likely involved?
questions.explanation: The same artifact can behave differently when production receives different runtime values.

questions.scenario: Which values are runtime configuration for `devpolaris-orders-api`?
questions.explanation: Database targets, storage targets, and feature flags are runtime values the app receives outside source code.

questions.scenario: A setting is saved in the portal, but checkout still fails. What should the team remember?

options.text: Saving configuration is not the same as proving the app received it and behaves correctly.
Portal settings always apply without restart or runtime effects.
The issue cannot be configuration after a value is saved.
The safest fix is to add duplicate settings with similar names.

questions.explanation: The app still needs to receive the value and prove behavior through safe evidence.
